title: K-200 Systems Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Systems Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-403-A. Revision: A. Type: design-note. Author: Priya Nair. Created: 2024-04-24. Last modified: 2024-10-20. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Systems subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1105.
